name: Pickled Onions
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sugar Or To Taste (up to 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the onions for 2 minutes in boiling water, then dip into cold water and peel.
2. Sprinkle the onions with salt, add enough cold water to cover, and let stand for 12 hours or overnight.
3. In the morning, drain the onions, rinse them in cold fresh water, and drain again.
4. Combine sugar, vinegar, mustard seeds, horseradish or peppercorns in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Pack the onions into clean jars, add 1 small hot pepper and 1 bay leaf to each jar.
6. Fill the jars with boiling-hot liquid, sealing tightly.
Makes 5 - 6 pints.
NOTE: You can also add 6 whole allspice or ¼ cup mixed pickling spices for interesting variations.
